rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KONNIE TAYLOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 13, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ANTWAN THOMAS' Motion To Vacate Default Judgment GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff's late-filed incomplete opposition is stricken. Defendant failed to sustain his burden under CCP 473(b). The motion is untimely, not supported by evidence, and no proposed pleading is attached. Defendant also failed to show that the judgment is void. The judgment on file shall be clarified to reflect that under the law it is not applicable to Konnie Taylor. Specifically, section 5 of the Form Judgment shall include the following language at the end: "except Konnie Taylor." Plaintiff to prepare amended judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JG HIDALGO REMODELING, LLC, VS. LAURA VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 13, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF JG HIDALGO REMODELING, LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden to provide competent evidence regarding property being sold in accordance with Section 2924 under the power of sale contained in a deed of trust and Plaintiff's right to possession of the Property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA ZARUR VS. TAFFI VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 13, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT TAFFI VASQUEZ, JIMMY ZARUR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in paragraph 18 of the Form Complaint (re: number of pages attached) with the actual number of the pages attached to the complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
